name: web-resurrect
description: Resurrect expired domains: scrape Wayback, AI-rewrite, generate images, publish to WordPress.
long_description: Pipeline complet pour faire revivre un domaine expiré : enrichissement SEO (Haloscan + Majestic), scraping de la Wayback Machine, réécriture AI, génération d'images, catégorisation, publication WordPress et redirections. Voir https://web-resurrect.com.

api_key.title: Web Resurrect API Key
api_key.description: Your API key (wr_live_xxx). Get one at https://web-resurrect.com/dashboard.

base_url.title: API Base URL
base_url.description: Override only for self-hosted or staging.
